_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
condition: Acute exacerbation of Interstitial Lung Disease
procedure_name: Acute exacerbation of Interstitial Lung Disease
source_files: Acute exacerbation of Interstitial Lung Disease_Medco.pdf
Acute exacerbation of Interstitial Lung Disease_PPD.CPD.pdf
clinical_indications: Acute worsening or development of dyspnea within less than 1 month
Increased sputum production, fever, and flu-like symptoms
Many patients present with a severe hypoxemia in the arterial blood gas analysis and respiratory failure

preauth.label: Clinical Notes including evaluation findings, indications for the procedure, and planned line of treatment
CBC, Blood Sugar (Fasting, PP and Random)

claim.label: Post treatment Chest X ray / CT scan report

ppd_preauth.q: Was the Clinical Notes including evaluation findings, indications for the procedure, and planned line of treatment submitted?
Was the Chest X ray / CT scan report submitted?
Was the CBC, Blood sugar (Fasting and PP) submitted?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed Indoor case papers with daily vitals and line of treatment?
Post treatment Chest X ray / CT scan report submitted?
Is the Discharge summary with follow-up advise at the time of discharge?

common_queries: Patient does not complain of continued cough with/without shortness of breath, despite the package criteria.
X-ray / CT scan report not suggestive of Interstitial Lung Disease (ILD) evidence.
Clinical notes lacking evaluation findings, indications, or planned line of treatment at pre-authorization.
Missing Chest X-ray / CT scan report at pre-authorization.
Post-treatment Chest X-ray / CT scan report not submitted at claim.
Detailed Indoor case papers (ICPs) are incomplete or not submitted at claim stage.
